calendar.matters:
Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: James J. Murphy, Esq. 731-9800 for petitioner & moving party; Gina M. Roccanova, Deputy City Atty 554-4241 for respondents & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner to submit order. (Petitioner restored to same status re eligible list.) (AJR/JH)

Writ Of Mandate And Alternative Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: JAMES J. MURPHY, 731-9800 FOR PLTF; GINA M. ROCCANOVA, 554-4241 FOR DEFT.
RULING: ARGUED, PLTF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINANCE WAS GRANTED. CONT TO 7-30-02 FOR HEARING. PETITIONER'S OPENING BRIEF DUE 7-1-02, RESPONDENCE'S OPP DUE 7-15-02, PETEITIONER'S REPLY DUE 7-22-02.

Writ Of Mandate And Alternative Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2002 Continued To Jun-19-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: James J. Murphy, Esq. 731-9800 for petitioner & moving party; Gina M. Roccanova, Deputy City Atty 554-4241 for respondents & opposing parties.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 06/19/02. Administrative record to be submitted by 05/22; supplemental papers to be filed by 05/29; opposition due by 06/07; reply due by 06/13. Petitioner to prepare order.
